task_completion.description: Verify the agent logs into the wger fitness management system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the wger login screen being filled with 'admin'/'adminadmin' or the subsequent logged-in dashboard showing the user is authenticated.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the gym or facility creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web page or form in the wger interface specifically for adding a new Gym or Facility.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct gym name is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'FitLife Downtown' entered into the 'Name' field of the gym creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct phone number and email address are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '+1-555-0142' entered into the Phone field and 'downtown@fitlife.com' entered into the Email field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct street, city, and zip code are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '742 Evergreen Terrace' in the Street field, 'Springfield' in the City field, and '62704' in the Zip Code field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully saves or submits the new gym.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking a 'Save' or 'Submit' button, followed by a success message or the new gym 'FitLife Downtown' appearing in the list of managed gyms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to create the gym.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with a web browser displaying the wger interface, rather than terminal commands like curl or python scripts making API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual wger application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the expected values being typed into the actual web form fields, not just written into a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or Django shell scripts directly inserting the gym records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected gym details to verify in the wger interface are: Name: 'FitLife Downtown', Phone: '+1-555-0142', Email: 'downtown@fitlife.com', Street: '742 Evergreen Terrace', City: 'Springfield', Zip Code: '62704'.
